zh.lifeSummary: 當John Symonds於1473年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特時，他的父親John Symonds24歲，母親Agnes Gravenor18歲。他和Ann Calthrope至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1520年在他的家鄉享年47歲。

nameMeanings.name: Symonds
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Simmons , with excrescent -d.

variants.name: Simmons
meanings: English (southeastern): variant of Simon , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Symonds was born in 1473, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Symonds, was 24 and his mother, Agnes Gravenor, was 18. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Ann Calthrope. He died in 1520, in his hometown, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Symonds est né en 1473, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Symonds, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Agnes Gravenor, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Ann Calthrope. Il est décédé en 1520, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Symonds 1473 in Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Symonds 24 und seine Mutter Agnes Gravenor 18. Er hatte mit Ann Calthrope mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1520 im Alter von 47 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

ja.lifeSummary: John Symondsが1473年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトで生まれた時，父John Symondsは24歳，母Agnes Gravenorは18歳であった。彼はAnn Calthropeとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1520年に故郷で47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Symonds(이)가 1473년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Symonds(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Gravenor(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Ann Calthrope(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1520년 그의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Symonds родился в 1473 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Symonds было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Gravenor, 18.
